推荐场景: 维修柜台｜听懂服务流程说明
60秒任务: 「服务说明」：预约/排队/规则/手续；A=抓住逻辑并总结；B=曲解/漏行动项翻车。
目标功能: 预约｜手续｜规则｜等待｜文件材料｜服务说明
场景族: 诊所前台｜银行/服务窗口｜邮局｜维修柜台｜咨询室
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
Could you explain the service process?（请求说明流程）
First, you need to ___.（说明第一步）
After that, we will ___.（说明后续）
You can choose the standard or express service.（说明选项）
The fee depends on ___.（说明费用依据）
It usually takes three to five working days.（说明时长）
You’ll get a message when it’s ready.（说明通知方式）
What happens if I miss the message?（询问异常情况）
Can I track the request online?（询问线上查询）
Please keep this receipt.（提醒保留凭证）
Let me summarize the steps.（总结流程）
So I pay first, then wait for the message.（复述确认）
If there is a problem, call this number.（说明解决方式）
That’s clear, thank you.（确认理解）
I’ll follow these steps.（确认执行）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: service process, standard service, express service, fee, receipt, message, request
Verbs: explain, choose, pay, process, track, receive
Adjectives / Adverbs: standard, express, ready, clear
Time / Place: first, after that, in three days, online
Chunks: service process, working days, keep the receipt, track the request, call this number
